title: Prove foundational Weltgewebe recovery
goal: Complete bounded failure and restore evidence for the Weltgewebe reference cell, PostgreSQL, JetStream and service return-to-primary semantics.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Failure exercises are isolated, rollback-bound and never destroy the sole recoverable copy.
A clean target reconstructs authoritative PostgreSQL and JetStream state from documented recovery inputs.
Frontend, API, auth and representative domain behavior pass after recovery.
Negative controls prove no simultaneous conflicting primary authority or duplicate irreversible effects.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
